task: Production Hardening and Vercel Deployment Preparation
key_learnings: Used 'import type' for TypeScript compliance with 'verbatimModuleSyntax'.
Implemented SPA rewrites and security headers in vercel.json.
Ensured 100% alt text coverage for tags to meet Accessibility requirements.
Resolved 'any' bypasses in Supabase RPC calls using unknown casting.
Standardized .gitignore and provided .env.example for secure deployments.
